{"action":"GO: north", "graph":{"nodes":["Living Room", "Library"],"edges":{"north":[],"south":[],"east":[],"west":[("Living Room", "Library")]}}}

...

{"action": "DONE", "graph": {...}}
Let us start.
You are in the Media room. Currently available directions: north. What is your next instruction?<|end|><|start|>assistant
